name: Hugging Knees
description: Always in the corner hugging onto the knees, staring out into the distance pensive in thought.

name: Sitting
description: Often found sitting silently and gazing down at something. Has a wary personality and prefers being alone.

name: Looking Back
description: A Smiski that scares easily. When found, it will turn back and stare at you in surprise.

name: Lounging
description: A lazy Smiski that likes to lie down and lounge about. Does not like anything that involves moving or exercise.

name: Hiding
description: Hiding is his specialty. Finds all sorts of spots to hide in. Feels most at home in small, narrow places.

name: Peeking
description: Always hunched over and peeking in from the corner. Needs to gather up courage before approaching anything.

name: Blowing Bubbles
description: Smiski is blowing soap bubbles. He wants to cover Sumi in soap bubbles.

name: Paper Airplane
description: Smiski is flying a paper airplane, dreaming of one day traveling far away in an airplane.

name: Sunbathing
description: Smiski is taking a nap in the sun. Nekoski is also sleeping soundly on his stomach.

name: Sing-Along
description: Smiski sings while playing the guitar. He's lost in his own song in the corner.

name: Skateboarding
description: Smiski riding her skateboard. Gliding along smoothly. Where should I go today?

name: Gardening
description: Smiski waters the flowers. Did a sprout grow out of his head because he loves plants so much?

name: Carrying Ladder
description: Smiski carries the ladder. A reliable presence, leading the way for everyone.

name: Balancing Boxes
description: Smiski is carrying a lot of luggage. Can't see where he's going because of all the luggage?

name: Decorating
description: Smiski carrying a lamp. What kind of interior should I use it for?

name: Little Smiski Teamwork
description: Smiski is carrying a large load. Even if it's heavy, can two people carry it?

name: Green Thumb
description: Smiski carrying a cactus. Even in his new home, Smiski needs some relaxation?

name: Falling Down
description: Smiski is carrying the luggage. Is the luggage okay?
